strengths: 15+ years across full stack with TypeScript/Node.js and React experience
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, Selenium courses, and custom test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older and limited in scope
Cloud/containerization signal is light — Docker present, but AWS/GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth is thin
response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of fullstack engineering with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience, plus direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that maps closely to the role. Testing rigor, architecture exposure, and open-source leadership are clear positives. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin specifically, and cloud/Kubernetes depth is not strongly demonstrated, though the breadth of stacks suggests these are learnable.
